description:
ICICI Lombard's Health AdvantEdge is a holistic plan designed to cater to your healthcare needs at all stages.
Whereas ICICI Lombard Elevate is an unlimited health insurance plan that provides unlimited sum insured options and access to an infinite claim amount with the Infinite Care benefit.

In this video, we have compared both both the plans on the basis of  features, waiting periods as well as the premiums.

WATCH THE VIDEO FOR MORE DETAILS :)

To buy insurance policies, click here - https://hareepatti.com/contact-us/
